```python
def shortest_palindrome():
    import sys
    S = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
    revS = S[::-1]
    combined = S + '#' + revS
    lps = [0] * len(combined)
    
    for i in range(1, len(combined)):
        j = lps[i-1]
        while j > 0 and combined[i] != combined[j]:
            j = lps[j-1]
        if combined[i] == combined[j]:
            j += 1
        lps[i] = j
    
    len_pal = lps[-1]
    return S + revS[:len(S) - len_pal]

print(shortest_palindrome())
```
